patterns.description: Sends null for optional Shell params (timeout, description) instead of omitting
patterns.hint: Optional tool parameters should be omitted entirely, not set to null. I removed the null fields for you.

patterns.description: Wraps file paths in markdown link syntax: [text](path) or trailing parenthesis
patterns.hint: File paths must be plain text. I stripped markdown link syntax from the path.

patterns.description: Emits JSON-encoded string where array expected (e.g. extensions field)
patterns.hint: I received a JSON string but expected an array. I've parsed it for you.

patterns.description: Omits offset/limit when reading files; smart-default based on first read
patterns.hint: I defaulted to offset=0, limit=100 for this first read. Adjust if the log/target is near the end of the file.

patterns.description: Sends empty object {} for a param that should be omitted entirely
patterns.hint: An empty object was sent where no value was needed. I removed it.

patterns.description: Wraps shell command in JSON.stringify format with escaped quotes
patterns.hint: The command was double-escaped as a JSON string. I unescaped it.
